message:
feat(abi): promote freeaddrinfo to native linked-list free

Remove host delegation for freeaddrinfo. The native manual free
implementation already handles both our Box-allocated addrinfos and
host-getaddrinfo results correctly (under LD_PRELOAD, our malloc is
the process allocator so Box::from_raw works for all allocations).

Host delegation count in resolv_abi.rs: 2 → 1 (only getaddrinfo DNS
fallback remains, requiring a native DNS stub resolver to eliminate).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
